calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:35am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, clerk Jean Kong, nothing reported,(D525)
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Wai Cheung appears with counsel Tifany R. Norman; Respondent, Las Villas Homeowners Association appears by Manager, Robert sims and property accountant, Olesya Meresiy. Parties previously sworn, respectively present their case in narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kane.
Respondent, Homeowners Assoc. objects that they have no knowlege of the appellant having a counsel; Judge Kane asks if the Homeowners Assoc. would like to have the case to continue and he informed her that it is common for the counsel to appear on the date of the hearing. Both side have agreed for the matter to be heard today by JPT Kane.

EXHA List of leger
EXHR List of polices

9:37am: Break for recess, for both side to exchange/review each other's exhibits.

10:37am: matter is resumed; all parties are present. Both sides represent their case.

Appellant counsel would like to see all the notices from Homeowners Assoc.to appellant that they said they had sent to appellant.
JPT Kane told the Resp/Homeowners of Asso. to e-mail all notices from the collection agency they said they had sent to appellant's counsel, TIFFANY@TRNLAW.COM and also to JPT Kane by September 6, 2013. Appellant to response by SEPT. 23, 2013 and if there is any other issues, for the parties to call JPT Kane.

11:35am
matter is submitted. Newly unmarked evidence is retained by JPT Kane.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Reset From Apr-23-13 To May-28-13 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
